use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF CHEMOTHERAPY-INDUCED NAUSEA AND VOMITING

USE IN COMBINATION WITH DEXAMETHASONE IN ADULTS FOR THE PREVENTION OF ACUTE AND DELAYED NAUSEA AND VOMITING ASSOCIATED WITH INITIAL AND REPEAT COURSES OF CANCER CHEMOTHERAPY, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, HIGHLY EMETOGENIC CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
AKYNZEO is indicated for the prevention of acute and delayed nausea and vomiting associated with
initial and repeat courses of cancer chemotherapy, including, but not limited to, highly emetogenic
chemotherapy. AKYNZEO is an oral fixed combination of palonosetron and netupitant: palonosetron
prevent...

chemotherapy. AKYNZEO is an oral fixed combination of palonosetron and netupitant: palonosetron
prevent...

• AKYNZEO capsules is indicated in combination with dexamethasone in adults for the
prevention of acute and delayed nausea and vomiting associated with initial and repeat courses
of cancer chemotherapy, including, but not limited to, highly emetogenic chemotherapy.
